title: Junior Moors
extract:
Junior Moors (born 30 July 1986) is a Samoa international rugby league footballer who plays as a prop, second-row, loose forward for Campbelltown City Kangaroos in the Group 6 Rugby League.
He previously played for the Penrith Panthers, Wests Tigers and the Melbourne Storm in the NRL, as well as Castleford Tigers in the Betfred Super League.
